channel.title: Home on Tanvir Shakil Joy | Software Engineer
channel.description: Recent content in Home on Tanvir Shakil Joy | Software Engineer

item.title: Rajshahi Silk Products Management System
item.description: A comprehensive web application for managing silk product inventory with role-based access control, REST APIs, authentication, search, notifications, and responsive UI.

item.title: Automated Diabetic Retinopathy Detection
item.description: An AI-powered system for detecting diabetic retinopathy from fundus images using ensemble CNNs with CBAM attention mechanism, integrated into a Django web application for real-time prediction.

item.title: About Me
item.description: Junior Software Engineer at TechnoNext Software Ltd.

item.title: Competitive Programming
item.description: 800+ problems solved across Codeforces, LeetCode, and HackerRank

item.title: Experience
item.description: Junior Software Engineer at TechnoNext Software Ltd.
